message:
fix(parser): fail-closed on super, tagged templates, new.target, and import.meta

Replace silent lowering of unsupported syntax forms with explicit
UnsupportedSyntax parse errors. This prevents the parser from producing
semantically incorrect ASTs for constructs it cannot faithfully represent.

parser.rs:
- Add early return for bare `super` in parse_primary_expression
- Replace tagged template expression lowering (previously emitted as a
  regular call with template argument) with UnsupportedSyntax error
- Add `super` guards in call expression, dot-member, and bracket-member
  postfix parsing paths
- All guards emit descriptive error messages for diagnostic clarity

parser_trait_ast.rs:
- Replace parser_emits_tagged_template_as_scaffold_call with
  parser_rejects_tagged_template_expressions (now expects parse error)
- Add parser_rejects_new_target_meta_property
- Add parser_rejects_import_meta_property
- Add parser_rejects_super_member_expression

Fixture updates:
- parser_grammar_closure_backlog.json: update notes to reflect fail-closed
  behavior for super/tagged-templates/new.target/import.meta; remove
  script_template_literal_tagged fixture ID from template family
- parser_phase0_semantic_fixtures.json: remove script_template_literal_tagged
  fixture (no longer a valid parse)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -485,7 +485,7 @@
         "artifacts/parser_phase0_gate/<timestamp>/run_manifest.json",

-      "notes": " PearlTower + RoseLake: added `new` expression parsing (new Foo(), new Foo.Bar(args)) and typed optional chaining coverage for `foo?.bar`, `foo?.[key]`, `foo?.()`, and nullish-coalescing interaction. Supports: foo(), foo.bar, foo[x], foo()(), foo.bar(), new Foo(args), new Foo.Bar(), foo?.bar, foo?.[key], foo?.(). Missing: super, tagged templates."
+      "notes": " PearlTower + RoseLake + BoldGrove: added `new` expression parsing (new Foo(), new Foo.Bar(args)) and typed optional chaining coverage for `foo?.bar`, `foo?.[key]`, `foo?.()`, and nullish-coalescing interaction. Supports: foo(), foo.bar, foo[x], foo()(), foo.bar(), new Foo(args), new Foo.Bar(), foo?.bar, foo?.[key], foo?.(). Special forms `super`, tagged templates, `new.target`, and `import.meta` now fail closed instead of silently lowering."
     },
     {
       "family_id": "expression.object_array_literal",
